title: Small constants can make C compiler assume signing

features.name: right shift with shift amount from conditional expression
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount is computed using a conditional expression with small integer literals

features.name: left shift of small literal by variable amount
features.description: Code should include a left shift of a small literal (1 or 2) by a variable that can approach or exceed 31 bits

features.name: ternary operator with unsized literals as shift amount
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator selecting between small unsized literals, used as shift amount in a shift operation
